Class ItemStackEditor

java.lang.Object
dev.yanianz.star.items.ItemStackEditor
@ParametersAreNonnullByDefault public class ItemStackEditor extends Object
Fluent class to apply edits/transformations to an ItemStack and it's ItemMeta instance

This class is immutable. The ItemStack instance which this class holds on to is never mutated.

See Also:

  • applyTo(ItemStack)
